sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: AlphaQuest LLC Buys 77,287 Shares of VICI Properties Inc. $VICI
feed.summary: AlphaQuest LLC significantly increased its stake in VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) during the third quarter, purchasing an additional 77,287 shares, which represents a 29,055.3% increase. The firm now holds 77,553 shares valued at approximately $2.53 million. This move is part of broader institutional interest in VICI, with the company demonstrating solid financial fundamentals including a market cap of $30 billion, a P/E ratio of 10.71, and a 6.4% dividend yield.

feed.title: Costco Wholesale Corporation (COST)'s "Been a Good Bounce," Says Jim Cramer
feed.summary: Jim Cramer commented on Costco Wholesale Corporation (COST)'s stock performance, noting that while there's been a "good bounce," it hasn't met his expectations for higher growth. Despite the stock being down 2.7% over the past year, it's up 11.5% year-to-date, with analysts like Mizuho raising price targets and ratings. The article also mentions potential benefits for Costco from tax refunds and optimistic premium member additions.

feed.title: "Let it go Down," Says Jim Cramer on Capital One (COF)
feed.summary: Jim Cramer expressed a strong positive sentiment on Capital One (COF) following its acquisition of Brex, despite some market disappointment and analysts lowering price targets. He dismissed concerns about short-term weakness, emphasizing CEO Richard Fairbank's expertise and the strategic value of the Brex acquisition for Capital One's expansion into corporate and high-spending customers. RGA Investment Advisors also supported Capital One, highlighting the transformative potential of its Discover acquisition in reshaping the US payments landscape by creating a vertically integrated entity.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight Rating on AT&T (T), Adjusts PT to $27
feed.summary: Wells Fargo maintained its Overweight rating on AT&T (T) but lowered its price target from $29 to $27, citing ongoing concerns about competition in the wireless sector despite anticipated stronger Q4 2025 fundamentals. Similarly, Barclays also reduced its price target for AT&T to $26 from $28 earlier in January, reflecting broader industry adjustments for 2026. Both firms acknowledge AT&T's position but highlight sector-wide challenges and potential strategic shifts.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Raises Pfizer (PFE) PT to $27 Amid Shifting Obesity Data Focus
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has increased its price target for Pfizer (PFE) to $27 from $24, while maintaining a Neutral rating, expecting investor focus to shift towards upcoming VESPER-3 obesity data rather than Q4 2025 earnings. This adjustment also considers potential updates on Pfizer's Lyme disease vaccine and cancer treatments. Separately, Pfizer announced positive Phase 3 trial results for BRAFTOVI in treating a specific type of metastatic colorectal cancer, showing a significant improvement in objective response rates.

feed.title: Invesco's (NYSE:IVZ) Dividend Will Be $0.21
feed.summary: Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) has announced a dividend of $0.21 per share, offering a 3.1% yield. While the company is not currently profitable, its free cash flows adequately cover the dividend, leading to a projected payout ratio of 9.0% next year. Despite a historical decline in dividends and shrinking earnings per share over the past five years, analysts anticipate higher EPS in the coming year, providing some comfort regarding future dividend sustainability.

feed.title: Mizuho Updates Centene (CNC) Valuation as Physician Survey Suggests Cooling Healthcare Utilization
feed.summary: Mizuho recently updated its price target for Centene (CNC) to $47 from $40, maintaining a Neutral rating, based on a physician survey indicating decelerated healthcare utilization growth. This adjustment reflects a potential peak in utilization trends. Other analysts, including Wells Fargo and Bernstein, also raised their price targets for Centene, citing varying sentiments on the managed care sector's outlook for 2026.

feed.title: Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB) Will Pay A Larger Dividend Than Last Year At $0.525
feed.summary: The Williams Companies, Inc. (NYSE:WMB) announced an increase in its dividend to $0.525, up 5.0% from the previous year, though the yield of 3.0% is still below the industry average. While future earnings per share are projected to grow significantly, potentially putting the payout ratio into a comfortable range, Simply Wall St expresses concerns about the dividend's sustainability due to past payout levels exceeding earnings and a slight decline in annual dividend payments over the last five years. The company's solid track record of increasing EPS is noted, but its high payout ratio and historical dividend shrinkage suggest it may not be an ideal income stock.

feed.title: RBC Capital Boosts HCA Healthcare (HCA) PT to $555 on Robust 2026 Guidance
feed.summary: RBC Capital has raised its price target for HCA Healthcare to $555 from $525, maintaining an Outperform rating after the company's strong Q4 2025 results and positive 2026 guidance. This confidence stems from better-than-expected core performance and strategic savings which are anticipated to offset regulatory headwinds. TD Cowen also increased its price target for HCA to $529 from $490, noting effective expense controls and a positive 2026 growth outlook that surpassed cautious market expectations.

feed.title: AE Wealth Management LLC Has $11.33 Million Stock Holdings in GE Vernova Inc. $GEV
feed.summary: AE Wealth Management LLC has significantly increased its stake in GE Vernova Inc. by 13.7% in the third quarter, now owning 18,424 shares valued at $11.33 million. This increase follows GE Vernova's strong Q4 performance, which included a substantial EPS beat and raised guidance, contributing to a record backlog. The company also announced a boosted quarterly dividend, reflecting growing analyst confidence despite concerns about its premium valuation and wind segment losses.

feed.title: New York State Common Retirement Fund Grows Stake in L3Harris Technologies Inc $LHX
feed.summary: The New York State Common Retirement Fund increased its stake in L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) by 29.5% in the third quarter, now owning 0.07% of the company worth approximately $38.3 million. Despite beating Q4 EPS expectations, L3Harris missed revenue forecasts but raised its full-year 2026 guidance, secured a Navy contract, and increased its quarterly dividend. The stock saw a 3.8% decline on near-term revenue concerns, while CEO Christopher Kubasik sold over 14,000 shares.

feed.title: APA CORP (NASDAQ:APA) Presents a Strong Technical Setup for a Potential Price Advance
feed.summary: APA Corp. (NASDAQ:APA) exhibits a strong technical setup, combining a high technical health score with a favorable setup quality rating, suggesting potential for a price advance. The company, an independent energy firm with operations in the Permian Basin, Egypt, and the North Sea, demonstrates a solid uptrend and is currently consolidating, possibly in preparation for a new upward movement. This analysis, based on technical indicators like positive trend direction, strong performance comparison, and supportive moving averages, points to an attractive opportunity for technical investors.

feed.title: AlphaQuest LLC Has $2.59 Million Stake in Corteva, Inc. $CTVA
feed.summary: AlphaQuest LLC increased its stake in Corteva, Inc. (NYSE:CTVA) by 78.8% to 38,229 shares, valued at approximately $2.59 million, during the third quarter. Institutional investors now own about 81.54% of the company, and analysts have a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $79.58. Corteva recently surpassed quarterly earnings expectations and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.18.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Makes Major Prediction For CSX Corporation (CSX)
feed.summary: Jim Cramer predicted a potential merger between CSX Corporation (NASDAQ:CSX) and Berkshire Hathaway’s Burlington. This prediction comes as CSX shares have seen modest gains over the past year, and the company recently missed analyst estimates in its Q4 earnings report. Cramer highlighted the new CEO, Steve Angel, as a key factor who might facilitate such a merger.

feed.title: Wipro GE Healthcare unveils SIGNA™ Prime Elite — a Made-in-India, AI-powered breakthrough in MR imaging
feed.summary: Wipro GE Healthcare has launched SIGNA™ Prime Elite, a "Made-in-India" AI-powered MR imaging system, at the IRIA 2026 Annual Conference in Hyderabad. This new system, manufactured at their PLI factory, aims to provide faster, more comfortable scans and improved diagnostic confidence, particularly in addressing the rising noncommunicable diseases in India. Leveraging AI technologies like AIR Recon DL™ and AIR™ Coils, it streamlines workflows, reduces scan times, and offers sustainable operations through intelligent magnet technology.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Says Procter & Gamble (PG)’s Finally Innovating
feed.summary: Jim Cramer believes Procter & Gamble (PG) is finally innovating, driven by a new CEO who is focused on international markets like Brazil, Mexico, and China. This positive outlook is echoed by JPMorgan, which upgraded the stock, while other analysts like Barclays and UBS have offered more mixed views due to potential headwinds and market uncertainty. Cramer sees this international focus as the beginning of a significant upward move for the company.

feed.title: Becton Dickinson (NYSE:BDX) Will Pay A Dividend Of $1.05
feed.summary: Becton, Dickinson and Company (NYSE:BDX) will pay a dividend of $1.05 per share on March 31st, bringing its annual payment to 2.1% of the stock price. The company's dividends appear sustainable, with the last payment making up 71% of earnings and cash flows being much higher. Becton Dickinson also has a solid track record of dividend growth, increasing its distributions by 5.8% annually over the last 10 years, and its earnings per share have grown at 46% a year over the past five years.

feed.title: Consolidated Edison (NYSE:ED) Will Pay A Larger Dividend Than Last Year At $0.8875
feed.summary: Consolidated Edison (NYSE:ED) is increasing its dividend to $0.8875, offering a yield comparable to the industry average. While the company's earnings cover the dividend, the lack of strong cash flow generation raises some caution regarding the dividend's long-term sustainability despite a solid track record of slow and steady dividend growth. The payout ratio is forecast to be sustainable at 54% next year as EPS is expected to grow by 16.7%.

feed.title: News Corp Class A: Quiet Rally, Louder Questions Behind NWSA’s Steady Grind Higher
feed.summary: News Corp Class A (NWSA) shares have shown a steady, quiet rally over the past year, in contrast to the broader media sector's struggles. The stock's performance reflects incremental operational improvements and a shift towards digital and subscription-driven businesses. Wall Street analysts are cautiously optimistic, with many issuing "Buy" or "Overweight" ratings, signaling a belief in the company's long-term strategy and potential for further upside.

feed.title: Lingohr Asset Management GmbH Invests $3.41 Million in Carrier Global Corporation $CARR
feed.summary: Lingohr Asset Management GmbH has acquired a new stake of 57,400 shares in Carrier Global Corporation, valued at approximately $3.41 million. This investment contributes to institutional investors owning about 91% of the company's stock. Carrier Global recently increased its quarterly dividend and approved a $5.0 billion share buyback program.

feed.title: Trump’s move on Maduro could lift San Antonio’s Valero as it eyes Venezuela oil
feed.summary: San Antonio-based Valero Energy Corp. is positioned to significantly benefit from the recent U.S. ouster of Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro, as increased access to Venezuela's heavy, high-sulfur crude perfectly matches Valero's refinery capabilities, particularly after a recent upgrade at its Port Arthur facility. The company, which has historically been the largest U.S. purchaser of Venezuelan oil, reported record-breaking fourth-quarter profits and throughput for 2025, with its stock price jumping over 8% after Maduro's capture. This development aligns with the Trump administration's plan to revive Venezuela's oil industry, further boosting Valero's prospects.

(NASDAQ:PYPL) by 56.5% in the third quarter, selling 20,508 shares and retaining 15,789 shares valued at $1.06 million. The article highlights recent insider selling, mixed analyst actions including both upgrades and downgrades, and other institutional investor activities.

feed.title: Newmont Corporation $NEM Stake Boosted by Keybank National Association OH

Porter, while institutional ownership remains high at 76.12%.

feed.title: Keysight Technologies Inc. $KEYS Stock Holdings Decreased by Bank of New York Mellon Corp

The company also authorized a $1.5 billion share repurchase program, and analysts currently hold a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock.

feed.title: Truist Financial Corp Has $17.65 Million Stock Holdings in Xcel Energy Inc. $XEL

Xcel Energy reported Q3 EPS of $1.24, missing estimates, with revenue up 7.4% to $3.92 billion, and maintains an average "Buy" rating from analysts with a consensus target price of $87.40. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.57 per share, representing an annualized dividend of $2.28 and a dividend yield of 3.0%.

feed.title: AustralianSuper Pty Ltd Sells 85,458 Shares of Gen Digital Inc. $GEN

feed.title: Stock Traders Buy Large Volume of Citigroup Call Options (NYSE:C)
feed.summary: Stock traders recently bought a significantly higher volume of Citigroup (NYSE:C) call options, representing a 170% increase over average daily volume, indicating heightened bullish interest. This comes after Citigroup reported better-than-expected EPS but missed on revenue, with its stock opening at $115.68 and a market cap of $206.98 billion. Analysts rate Citigroup as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $125.56, and the company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.60.

feed.title: Evergreen Capital Management LLC Increases Stock Position in Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL
feed.summary: Evergreen Capital Management LLC increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. by 7.8% during the third quarter, making the stock its 11th largest holding. This move comes as Alphabet beat quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. Despite institutional investment, company insiders have recently been net sellers of Alphabet shares.

feed.title: Federated Hermes Inc. Sells 23,039 Shares of Marathon Petroleum Corporation $MPC
feed.summary: Federated Hermes Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Marathon Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:MPC) by selling 23,039 shares, decreasing its holdings by 15.8% to 122,954 shares valued at $23.7 million. This move comes as analysts have become more cautious, with many issuing "Hold" ratings and reducing price targets for MPC. Despite this, Marathon Petroleum recently beat earnings estimates and institutions collectively own 76.77% of the company's stock.

feed.title: Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI) Short Interest Down 28.0% in January
feed.summary: Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI) experienced a 28.0% decrease in short interest in January, reaching 12,496,898 shares by January 15th. This reduction brings the days-to-cover ratio down to approximately 1.6 days. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $126.61, and recently reported strong quarterly earnings that beat expectations, along with a consistent quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp stock price: FITB’s $2 billion note sale meets a jumpy rates backdrop
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp recently sold $2 billion in fixed-to-floating senior notes amidst a volatile interest rate environment. The bank's stock reacted to rate moves, and the market is now eyeing upcoming U.S. jobs data and signals regarding future interest rate decisions by the Federal Reserve, which could impact funding costs, loan demand, and credit quality for regional banks like Fifth Third.

feed.title: Teacher Retirement System of Texas Cuts Stock Position in Equitable Holdings, Inc. $EQH
feed.summary: The Teacher Retirement System of Texas significantly reduced its stake in Equitable Holdings, Inc. (EQH) by 70.2% in Q3, selling 93,646 shares. This move leaves them with 39,814 shares valued at $2.022 million, while several other institutional investors either increased or initiated positions in the company. Equitable reported a third-quarter EPS of $1.48, missing analyst estimates, and saw its revenue decline by 52.8% year-over-year, leading to a negative P/E ratio and recent insider selling from top executives.

feed.title: CG Oncology, Inc. (NASDAQ:CGON) Sees Large Decline in Short Interest
feed.summary: CG Oncology, Inc. (NASDAQ:CGON) experienced a significant 27.3% decline in short interest during January, reaching 9,387,150 shares as of January 15th. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $67.83, and multiple firms have recently increased their price objectives. Despite recent insider stock sales, institutional investors have been adjusting their positions, and the company reported quarterly earnings meeting analyst expectations while exceeding revenue forecasts.

feed.title: ‘Bearish engulfing’ patterns are warning you: Don’t buy the dip in gold-miner stocks
feed.summary: A "bearish engulfing" technical pattern has appeared in a widely traded gold-mining ETF and in gold-sector heavyweight Newmont, signaling that investors should not buy the dip in gold-miner stocks. Despite gold's rally to record prices, the gold-miner sector has significantly outperformed the metal. This pattern suggests a potential reversal, cautioning against investing in the current downturn.

feed.title: HubSpot, Inc. $HUBS Stock Position Reduced by Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd
feed.summary: Y Intercept Hong Kong Ltd significantly cut its stake in HubSpot by 89.7% in Q3 2025, selling 26,484 shares and retaining 3,036 shares valued at $1.42 million. Meanwhile, insider Brian Halligan sold 8,500 shares for $2.58 million, contributing to a total of $8.94 million in insider sales over three months. Wall Street analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus but have recently lowered price targets on the stock, which is trading around $279.98.

feed.title: Brookfield Renewable Q4 2025 Results: $678M Profit, Revenue Hits $1.54B - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Brookfield Renewable Energy Partners LP (BEP) reported a net income of $678 million in Q4 2025, reversing a loss from the previous year and exceeding analyst expectations for earnings. The company posted full-year net income of $712 million on $3.54 billion in revenue and saw its shares rise by 5.5% year-to-date and 38% over the last 12 months. While earnings beat estimates, its adjusted revenue of $885 million missed Street forecasts of $934 million.

feed.title: Looking for Growth and Income? These 3 High-Yield Dividend Stocks Just Hiked Their Payouts Again.
feed.summary: This article highlights three high-yield dividend stocks—Oneok (OKE), Kinetik Holdings (KNTK), and Williams (WMB)—that have recently increased their payouts. These companies, operating in the pipeline and energy infrastructure sector, offer dividends yielding between 3% and 8%. The article emphasizes the benefits of dividend growth stocks for long-term investors, citing the companies' strong financial profiles and ongoing expansion projects as drivers for continued dividend growth.

feed.title: B2Gold stock dives as gold’s record slump rattles miners ahead of BTG earnings
feed.summary: B2Gold (BTG) shares plummeted by 11.7% following a significant gold sell-off, which also impacted other gold miners as the dollar strengthened. The market is now focused on B2Gold's upcoming Q4 and full-year 2025 results and its 2026 guidance, which will be released in mid-February, to assess the impact of gold's volatile performance on the company's outlook. Investors are closely watching whether gold prices will stabilize or trigger a further decline, as miners' profit margins are highly sensitive to these fluctuations.

feed.title: Halliburton Bets On NEX Lab To Turn Research Into Low Carbon Tools
feed.summary: Halliburton has launched the Next-Generation Energy Accelerators Joint Lab (NEX Lab) in Singapore, a collaboration with A*STAR, to focus on advanced well completion technologies and support energy transition efforts with low carbon solutions. This initiative aims to expand research and testing capabilities, attracting local talent and positioning Halliburton for future low-carbon opportunities, aligning with its existing narrative of embracing clean energy technologies and digital automation. The success of NEX Lab will depend on its ability to translate research into commercially viable offerings, shortening time to market for new completion technologies amidst execution and capital cost risks.

feed.title: National Pension Service Has $267.05 Million Stock Holdings in HCA Healthcare, Inc. $HCA
feed.summary: National Pension Service increased its stake in HCA Healthcare by 2.9% in Q3, holding shares valued at $267.05 million. HCA Healthcare exceeded quarterly EPS expectations, raised its FY2026 guidance, and increased its quarterly dividend, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus among analysts. The company also saw significant institutional investment and positive sentiment from various financial firms due to strong earnings, strategic initiatives, and brand recognition.

feed.title: Valero Energy’s Stock Tests Investor Nerves As Refining Cycle Wobbles
feed.summary: Valero Energy's stock has seen a recent dip despite strong quarterly earnings, raising questions for investors about whether this signals a deeper correction or a buying opportunity. The company's performance over the last year, including generous dividends, still shows a positive total return, yet the market is cautiously reassessing its near-term upside due to potential cooling margins and cyclical concerns. While Wall Street analysts generally maintain a "Buy" rating, there's growing sentiment that the best part of the refining cycle might be over, leading to a focus on cash returns rather than aggressive price appreciation.

feed.title: TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. Increases Holdings in Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. $HLT
feed.summary: TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. significantly increased its stake in Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HLT) by 99.7% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 15,526 shares valued at approximately $3.99 million. This move is part of a broader trend of high institutional ownership in Hilton, which stands at 95.90%. Several analysts have issued positive ratings and increased price targets for Hilton, indicating a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: New York State Common Retirement Fund Has $36.11 Million Position in Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc $KDP
feed.summary: The New York State Common Retirement Fund decreased its stake in Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ:KDP) by 7.2% in the third quarter, now owning 1,415,398 shares valued at approximately $36.11 million. Institutional investors hold 93.99% of the company's stock, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $34.87. Additionally, the company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.23 per share, and a VP recently sold 10,000 shares in an insider transaction.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL Shares Sold by Bfsg LLC
feed.summary: Bfsg LLC reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 18.3% during the third quarter, selling 1,911 shares and holding 8,517 shares valued at $2.07 million. Despite institutional selling, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $334.60, citing Google's AI advancements like Project Genie offsetting IP and regulatory concerns.
